sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37694" key="e)cumenisth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξῠμεν-ιστήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n37694.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">flaying</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dissecting knife,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
